summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 largely as specified. AuthGate.tsx adds a 'Remember Me' checkbox with localStorage persistence and an auto-login attempt on mount. Layout.tsx adds a confirmation dialog before sign-out when 'Remember Me' is enabled, and clears the preference on confirmed sign-out. However, there is one notable gap: the auto-login mechanism calls login() which triggers the Internet Identity flow rather than restoring an existing session silently, meaning the user may be re-prompted for authentication rather than seamlessly remaining signed in.

missing_requirements.requirement: When 'Remember Me' is stored as true in localStorage, the app should restore/maintain the authenticated session on page load without re-prompting login.
missing_requirements.reason: The auto-login in AuthGate.tsx calls login() which re-triggers the Internet Identity login flow (potentially re-prompting the user) rather than silently restoring an existing session. This may not satisfy 'remains signed in after closing and reopening the browser tab' without user interaction.
